title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Bukayo Saka Signs 5-Year Deal With Arsenal To Become Club's Highest-Paid Player
items.description: Arsenal star Bukayo Saka has signed a new long-term contract, making him the highest paid player at the club.

items.title: 2026 UFL Uniforms: New, Updated Threads and Colorways for All 8 Teams
items.description: Here are the new and updated uniforms — home and away — for all eight teams ahead of the highly anticipated 2026 UFL season.

items.title: 2026 NCAA Tournament Projections: Iowa State Surges, Michigan State Falls
items.description: FOX Sports' bracket forecaster Mike DeCourcy offers up his latest men's NCAA Tournament projections.

items.title: AP College Basketball Players of the Week: Louisville's Brown, TCU's Miles
items.description: The Associated Press College Basketball Players of the Week for Week 15 are Louisville's Mikel Brown Jr. and TCU's Olivia Miles.

items.title: Moe, legendary former Nuggets coach, dies at 87
items.description: Doug Moe, who engineered one of the best offenses of its era as coach for the Denver Nuggets in the 1980s, has died at the age of 87.

items.title: Tiger won't rule out return at this year's Masters
items.description: Tiger Woods is not ruling out a return to professional golf as early as this year's Masters.
